overview: A modern, high-conversion SaaS technology company website for a tech solutions provider specializing in scalable SaaS applications. Features a hero section, services overview, detailed product showcases (E-commerce, PG Management, Travel), testimonials, tech stack, and contact form — with dark/light mode, glassmorphism cards, and electric blue/purple gradient accents.
features: Hero section with animated gradient background and dual CTAs
3 product solution showcases (E-commerce, PG Management, Travel)
